title: Xylem (XYL) Surges 52% in a Year: Will the Momentum Continue?
text: Xylem (XYL) gains from strong demand across its end markets and improving supply chains. The Evoqua acquisition is expected to bolster its growth.

title: Xylem to Release Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results on August 2, 2023
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #LetsSolveWater--Xylem Inc. will release its second quarter 2023 results at 6:55 a.m. (ET) on Wednesday, August 2, 2023.

title: Best Income Stocks to Buy for June 16th
text: INGR, BTVCY and XYL made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) income stocks list on June 16, 2023.

title: Xylem (XYL) Upgraded to Buy: Here's Why
text: Xylem (XYL) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

title: Xylem's Next-generation Ultrasonic Water Meter Helps Transform Customer Service for North American Utilities
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #LetsSolveWater--The largest water users in a utility's customer base typically hail from commercial and industrial (C&I) businesses that depend on reliable water access to function. This specialized customer group requires precise tracking that helps them avoid water loss and ensure that costs are affordable. Enter Cordonel®, an innovative ultrasonic C&I water meter from Sensus, a Xylem brand, which features a patented technology that measures low-to-high-volume flow with p.
